title: x-persona input corpus
description: The input the skill analyzes: a JSON array of one account's tweets. x-persona does NOT fetch or scrape — you supply this file, produced however suits you (your X data export, the official API, your own tooling). See examples/synthetic-account.json for a sample.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp, e.g. 2025-07-22T17:33:00.000Z. Used to sort and to build the year/month breakdown — required for the longitudinal analysis.

is_retweet.description: True if this is a retweet of someone else.

is_reply.description: True if this is a reply.

lang.description: Optional BCP-47-ish language code (e.g. "en"), or null.
